creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lippe       2008-06-07 14:58:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/ezradius    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  ezRADIUS is FreeRADIUS and Chillispot web-based management apps. It's easy, simple and expandable. The main aim is to provide radius server administrator a simple web-based management application. FreeRADIUS must configured to use MySQL as backend.
  
  WWW: http://ezradius.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/124176
  Submitted by:   Lucio Costa <lucio@zetasolucoes.com.br>
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.159     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/net-mgmt/ezradius/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/ezradius/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/ezradius/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +265 -0    ports/net-mgmt/ezradius/pkg-plist (new)
